attacking_style: Long-range diesel efforts, bridging solo in final 15-20km. Prioritizes early breakaways for secondary objectives (KOM points) when GC not viable.
team_tactics: Limited evidence of coordinated team support; appears to operate independently in breakaways. Mechanical support failures suggest lower prioritization in team hierarchy.
terrain_preference: Flat to rolling terrain suited to sustained power output. Cobbles manageable but physical size creates disadvantage on technical circuits and velodrome finishes.
vulnerability: Technical circuits expose size disadvantage (velodrome banking); mechanical reliability issues under high power output; team support gaps in critical moments.
key_patterns: Solo bridging efforts in final 15-20km demonstrate sustained diesel engine capability (2 instances)
Early breakaway participation for secondary objectives when not targeting overall result (2 instances)
Physical size creates handling disadvantage on technical finishes like velodromes (2 instances)
Mechanical failures under peak power output suggest equipment durability issues (2 instances)
form_trajectory: neutral: 2023 mechanical disasters mask actual form; earlier consistency in long-range efforts suggests stable baseline capability
